name: Obsidian Drape Coat
description: Engineered from a heavy-weight recycled wool blend, this coat features an asymmetric drape that defies traditional silhouette boundaries.

name: Monolith Crossbody Bag
description: A structural masterpiece cast in molded vegan leather. The monolith design rejects embellishment in favor of extreme geometric precision.

name: Void Tactical Trousers
description: Constructed with ripstop nylon and articulated seams. These trousers offer unparalleled mobility while maintaining a stark, unyielding aesthetic.

name: Ethereal Knit Top
description: A translucent geometric mock neck knit. Wear it to inject a subtle organic texture into your high-contrast industrial wardrobe.

name: Storm Shell Parka
description: A fortress against the elements. Triple-sealed seams with a Gore-Tex membrane ensure absolute waterproofing without sacrificing form.

name: Carbon Weave Sneakers
description: 3D-printed carbon fiber lattice sole with adaptive cushioning. The upper is woven from recycled filament for a seamless, sock-like fit.

name: Prism Linen Shirt
description: Lightweight organic linen with a relaxed boxy cut. UV-reactive thread subtly shifts hue under direct sunlight for a living textile.

name: Graphite Cargo Joggers
description: Reinforced at every stress point with ballistic nylon. Eight pockets integrate seamlessly into the tapered silhouette.

name: Phantom Leather Jacket
description: Hand-distressed plant-based leather with asymmetric zip closure. The phantom silhouette elongates the torso for a commanding editorial presence.

name: Solar Mesh Tank
description: Ultra-lightweight perforated mesh with moisture-wicking technology. Designed for maximum airflow in extreme heat conditions.

name: Glacier Insulated Vest
description: Thermoregulating graphene-infused insulation trapped between a matte shell. Pairs with any base layer for an adaptive cold-weather system.

name: Dusk Utility Belt
description: Magnetic-clasp modular belt system with detachable pouches. Matte black hardware designed for silent deployment.

name: Nimbus Rain Boots
description: Vulcanized rubber upper with heat-sealed seams. The chunky platform sole channels water away for zero-puddle traversal.

name: Aether Oversized Hoodie
description: Triple-ply cotton fleece with an exaggerated drop shoulder. The oversized hood provides atmospheric isolation in any environment.

name: Flux Bermuda Shorts
description: Quick-dry ripstop fabric with an elastic waistband. Minimalist design engineered for tropical conditions and maximum ventilation.

name: Sentinel Wool Scarf
description: Himalayan-sourced merino wool, brushed to an ultra-soft finish. Generous dimensions allow for multiple wrapping configurations.
